title: Electrophysiology FEM Simulation with openCARP
description: Finite-element simulation of electrical wave propagation in cardiac tissue and organ-scale geometries using openCARP. Models reentrant arrhythmias in patient-derived meshes.

title: Physics-Informed Neural Operator for EP Surrogate Modelling
description: Developing a physics-informed neural operator as a surrogate model for cardiac electrophysiology simulations, enabling fast inference while respecting underlying PDE constraints.

title: Biomedical Imaging with AI
description: End-to-end pipeline for medical image analysis — from raw data preprocessing and artifact correction to deformable image registration using deep learning.

title: CPU Design from NAND Gates
description: Full CPU built from first principles: NAND gates → logic gates → ALU → registers → control unit → instruction set. Implemented in HDL as part of a computer organization course.

title: Cardiac Action Potential Simulator
description: Numerical simulation of ventricular action potentials using the ten Tusscher–Noble–Noble–Panfilov model. Explores how ion channel conductances affect arrhythmia onset.

title: EEG Artifact Removal Pipeline
description: Automated pipeline for removing ocular and muscular artifacts from EEG recordings using ICA decomposition and wavelet thresholding in MATLAB/Simulink.
